posts.caption:
We partnered with Lakmé to spotlight their Lakmé Sun Expert and Lakmé Fluid Sunscreen with two powerful podcast integrations. 💫

To build awareness and educate audiences on the truth behind SPF & PA++ labeling, we curated a special podcast collaboration with Curly Tales Podcast, featuring Dermatologists and Influencers who decoded the science of sunscreen. The episode showcased Lakmé’s rigorous in-house testing process, proving its SPF claims are not just marketing, but medically backed. 

For the Lakmé Fluid Sunscreen, we curated a subtle and organic brand integration with the Moments of Silence Podcast, hosted by Sakshi Shivdasani & Naina Bhan, with the guest Viraj Ghelani, bridging gender inclusivity and building credibility among diverse audiences.

Both episodes are released today in celebration of Sunscreen Day. At BloomX Business Solutions, we’re proud to co-create content that builds brand trust, awareness, and authentic connections.

Kudos to our team🚀💯

#BloomxSolutions #PodcastMarketing #LakméSunscreen #SPFTested #CurlyTales
